languages.text: "Чернь забыла лик своего господина. Я освежу им память".

traits.locale_text: "Серфы забыли лик своего господина. Я освежу им память".

languages.text: "The rabble have forgotten their Lord Captain's visage. I shall refresh their memory."
languages.original_text: "Чернь забыла лик своего господина. Я освежу им память".

traits.locale_text: "The rabble have forgotten their Lord Captain's visage. I shall refresh their memory."

languages.text: 「あいつらは、船長の顔を見失った。私は彼らの記憶を呼び起こす」
languages.original_text: "The rabble have forgotten their Lord Captain's visage. I shall refresh their memory."

languages.text: "Ayaktakımı, Lord Kaptan'ın suretini unutmuş. Hafızalarını tazeleyeceğim."
languages.original_text: "The rabble have forgotten their Lord Captain's visage. I shall refresh their memory."

traits.locale_text: "Ayaktakımı, Lord Kaptan'ın suretini unutmuş. Hafızalarını tazeleyeceğim."

languages.text: “这群贱民显然遗忘了舰长的威仪。我去帮他们长长记性。”
languages.original_text: "The rabble have forgotten their Lord Captain's visage. I shall refresh their memory."

traits.locale_text: “这群贱民显然遗忘了舰长的威仪。我去帮他们长长记性。”

languages.text: "Das Gesindel hat das Gesicht seines Lord Captains vergessen. Ich werde ihr Gedächtnis auffrischen."
languages.original_text: "The rabble have forgotten their Lord Captain's visage. I shall refresh their memory."

traits.locale_text: "Das Gesindel hat das Gesicht seines Lord Captains vergessen. Ich werde ihr Gedächtnis auffrischen."

languages.text: « Puisque la populace semble avoir oublié le visage de {mf|son seigneur-capitaine|sa seigneure-capitaine}, je m'en vais lui rafraîchir la mémoire. »
languages.original_text: "The rabble have forgotten their Lord Captain's visage. I shall refresh their memory."

traits.locale_text: « Puisque la populace semble avoir oublié le visage de {mf|son seigneur-capitaine|sa seigneure-capitaine}, je m'en vais lui rafraîchir la mémoire. »

languages.text: «Esa chusma ha olvidado la cara de su Lord Capitán. Se la recordaré».
